svg.title: Chaos Pit splash screen
svg.desc: Modern playful splash screen for the game Chaos Pit

text.font-family: 'Arial Rounded MT Bold', 'Nunito', 'Varela Round', Arial, sans-serif
text.style: stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Arial Rounded MT Bold", Nunito, "Varela Round", Arial, sans-serif;font-size:118px;font-weight:900;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

text.font-family: 'Arial Rounded MT Bold', 'Nunito', 'Varela Round', Arial, sans-serif
text.style: fill:none;stroke:rgb(255, 255, 255);color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1.5px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:0.12;font-family:"Arial Rounded MT Bold", Nunito, "Varela Round", Arial, sans-serif;font-size:118px;font-weight:900;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

text.font-family: 'Arial Rounded MT Bold', 'Nunito', 'Varela Round', Arial, sans-serif
text.style: stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Arial Rounded MT Bold", Nunito, "Varela Round", Arial, sans-serif;font-size:118px;font-weight:900;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

text.font-family: 'Arial Rounded MT Bold', 'Nunito', 'Varela Round', Arial, sans-serif
text.style: fill:none;stroke:rgb(255, 255, 255);color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1.5px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:0.12;font-family:"Arial Rounded MT Bold", Nunito, "Varela Round", Arial, sans-serif;font-size:118px;font-weight:900;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto
